page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Privacy-Preserving Record Linkage using Secure Multi-Party Computation.

This repository is a fork of the official Mainzelliste project, embodying the features described in the paper “Mainzelliste SecureEpiLinker (MainSEL): Privacy-Preserving Record Linkage using Secure Multi-Party Computation”. It is intended that these new features will eventually be integrated back into the official Mainzelliste software.: https://bitbucket.org/medicalinformatics/mainzelliste/src.
